value.found_quote: [GitHub](https://github.com/github/github-mcp-server): Manage GitHub beyond what `git` supports (for example, pull requests and issues).
value.rationale: The page lists GitHub as an example of a useful MCP server that Codex can connect to, describing it as a way to manage GitHub beyond what git supports. This substantiates that OpenAI's Codex offers/supports a GitHub integration via MCP. Note the GitHub MCP server itself is third-party (github/github-mcp-server), but the page describes it as a supported integration. Status is presented as currently available with no retirement notice.
